title: oplismenus stagninus
intro: Oplismenus stagninus, also known as floating wind-grass, is a perennial grass native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus stagninus include reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal preparations such as infusions and poultices.
